text:
Market today: The mood is cautious, with geopolitical tensions (US-Iran, China AI sanctions) being the real drivers. These could directly impact your tech/chip heavy portfolio by disrupting supply chains or dampening demand.

Your holdings: SOXL (-39.14%) and SPAL (-45.33%) are both leveraged ETFs showing significant drawdowns; their default stops are too high given current prices. SMH (-8.97%) and QQQI (-2.33%) are also close to their stops. Remember, margin amplifies these drops.

Watch: Keep a close eye on any further developments regarding potential US sanctions on China's AI sector. Also, monitor your leveraged positions closely for stop breaches.

Bottom line: Your significant losses in leveraged ETFs demand immediate attention, especially with rising geopolitical risks.
plays: Respect stops on SMH (540) and QQQI (52) to protect capital if they continue to slide.
Review SOXL and SPAL stops immediately; their current losses are substantial, and leveraged decay is a major risk.
No new buys today - hold and watch, especially given the geopolitical uncertainty.
